name: kikabon
description: KIKABON - jeu quiz live pour la formation

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=[['index (2).html','public/index.html'],['player.html','public/player.html'],['style.css','public/style.css'],['app.js','public/app.js'],['admin.js','public/admin.js'],['game.js','public/game.js'],['player.js','public/player.js'],['_redirects','public/_redirects']]; if(!fs.existsSync('public')) fs.mkdirSync('public'); files.forEach(([src,dest])=>fs.copyFileSync(src,dest)); console.log('Build completed - files copied to ./public');"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('public')) fs.rmSync('public',{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Clean completed - public directory removed');"
